phaseGoal: 为 v0.2.0 Context OS 增加轻量 context budget ledger，让 Context Packet 能诚实标记体量、风险 section 和压缩建议。
deliverable: Context Budget Ledger v1 schema, runtime budget builder, and Context Packet budget integration
inScope: runtime budget builder using heuristic JSON character and section-size estimates
warnings for oversized packet sections and long text payloads
targeted tests for small, warning, and over-budget packet scenarios
stopCondition: Context Packet includes a budget ledger that identifies estimated size, budget level, heaviest sections, and compression advice without requiring tokenizer or model APIs.
